text:
## Data Retention Policy

### Section 1: Scope
This policy applies to all personal data processed by the company.

### Section 2: Retention Periods
Customer personal data shall be retained for a maximum of 5 years from the date of last interaction. After expiry, data must be securely deleted within 30 days.

### Section 3: Exceptions
Data subject to active litigation or regulatory investigation may be retained beyond the standard period with approval from the Legal department.

## Privacy Notice Policy

### Section 1: Purpose
All data collection activities must be accompanied by a clear privacy notice.

### Section 2: Content Requirements
Privacy notices must include: identity of the controller, purpose of processing, legal basis, retention period, and data subject rights.

### Section 3: Consent
Where consent is the legal basis, it must be freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous. Pre-ticked boxes are not permitted.

## Information Security Policy

### Section 1: Access Control
Access to personal data systems must follow the principle of least privilege. All access must be authenticated via multi-factor authentication.

### Section 2: Encryption
Personal data must be encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.

### Section 3: Breach Notification
Any suspected data breach must be reported to the DPO within 24 hours of discovery.
